answers: Start retirement savings early — compound interest is powerful. Even small amounts in your 20s grow significantly by 60s.
Retirement planning: calculate needed amount, save 15-20% of income, invest in diversified portfolio, and reduce debt.
Tips: don't rely solely on social security/pension, have multiple income streams, and plan for healthcare costs.
Rule of thumb: save 25x your annual expenses for retirement. Start now — the best time to start was yesterday.
